title: Karen Denne
compiled_truth: Karen Denne is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1999-09-03 to 2002-01-17), Karen Denne sent 333 and received 2832 emails, totalling 3165 interactions. Top correspondents: [Jeff Dasovich](people/jeff-dasovich) (206), [Susan Mara](people/susan-mara) (104), [Richard Shapiro](people/richard-shapiro) (93), [Steven Kean](people/steven-kean) (89), [Mark Palmer](people/mark-palmer) (78). Mailbox folders observed: _americas, aadepartment, california, california_issues, compliments, deleted_items.
